title: Ngor Surf Guide: Understanding Ngor Right and Ngor Left
hero_image_prompt: Split-scene surf panorama of Ngor Right peeling clean and Ngor Left breaking powerfully near island reef, surfers waiting in lineup, deep blue Atlantic, rocky shoreline, dramatic clouds, iconic Senegal surf destination, crisp magazine-style action landscape.
